arts.ttl: 'Superb' Cardiff City player surprised Omer Riza at Aston Villa as boss full of pride
arts.sum: The Bluebirds manager expressed his delight at his players' performances in the FA Cup tie

arts.ttl: Marco Asensio's Marcus Rashford admission speaks volumes after Man Utd criticism
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford joined Aston Villa on loan from Manchester United for the second half of the Premier League season and has already made an impression with his new team-mates

arts.ttl: Asensio double sends Villa to FA Cup quarter-finals
arts.sum: Watch highlights as Marco Asensio scores twice to send Aston Villa to the FA Cup quarter-finals after beating Cardiff City 2-0 at Villa Park.

arts.ttl: Rashford and Asensio combine to put Villa ahead
arts.sum: January signings Marcus Rashford and Marco Asensio combine to give Aston Villa the lead against Cardiff in their FA Cup fifth-round tie.
Villa flew forward, and a heroic block from Joel Bagan thwarted Rashford from close range. FINAL SCORE: ASTON VILLA 2-0 CARDIFF CITY

arts.ttl: Asensio at the double again to see Aston Villa past Cardiff into FA Cup last eight
arts.sum: Two more goals from Marco Asensio enabled Aston Villa to reach the last eight of the FA Cup for the first time since they made it to the final in 2015. Unai Emery’s team continue to blow hot and cold but, four points off fifth place in the Premier League and with a last-16 tie with Club Brugge starting on Tuesday, all their dreams remain possible. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Cardiff City player ratings as star plays out of his skin and teenage debutant impresses at Aston Villa
arts.sum: Here is how the Bluebirds rated in the FA Cup clash at Villa Park

arts.ttl: John Townley's Villa player ratings after 2-0 win vs Cardiff in the FA Cup
arts.sum: The first chance of the game fell to Ollie Watkins, who was found by Asensio with an exquisite pass, but Cardiff goalkeeper Ethan Horvath closed the angle to goal well. Marco Asensio scored a brace in successive home matches after being picked out by Marcus Rashford and then Leon Bailey.

arts.ttl: Marco Asensio brace guides Aston Villa into FA Cup quarter-finals
arts.sum: They are into the last eight for the first time since 2014/15 season.

arts.ttl: Rashford and Asensio combine to give Villa the lead
arts.sum: January signings Marcus Rashford and Marco Asensio combine to give Aston Villa the lead against Cardiff in their fifth-round FA Cup tie.
